files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "jaeger-1474-support-elasticsearch-7-x",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "jaeger: Support Elasticsearch 7.x",
+    "description": "Support Elasticsearch 7.x. Requested by 20+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current jaeger deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your jaeger version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n jaeger -l app.kubernetes.io/name=jaeger\nhelm list -n jaeger 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working jaeger installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review jaeger configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant jaeger configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n jaeger -l app.kubernetes.io/name=jaeger\nkubectl get configmap -n jaeger -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=jaeger\n```\nSince 7.0 just came out of Elasticsearch, how long will it typically take for Jaeger Ingest to be updated to 7.0?"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Support Elasticsearch 7.x",
+        "description": "Adds support for Elasticsearch 7.x\r\nDepends on https://github.com/olivere/elastic/pull/1146\n\n- Updates github.com/olivere/elastic to 6.2.21\n- Removes the deprecated _default_ field from mappings\n- Replaces document types with '_doc' as a transition step to removing them entirely\n- Sets\n```yaml\nHTTP Error: Search service failed: json: cannot unmarshal object into Go struct field SearchHits.total of type int64\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n jaeger -l app.kubernetes.io/name=jaeger\nkubectl get events -n jaeger --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Support Elasticsearch 7.x\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Adds support for Elasticsearch 7.x\r\nDepends on https://github.com/olivere/elastic/pull/1146\n\n- Updates github.com/olivere/elastic to 6.2.21\n- Removes the deprecated _default_ field from mappings\n- Replaces document types with '_doc' as a transition step to removing them entirely\n- Sets include_type_name for compatibility between elasticsearch 6.x and 7.x\n\nrest_total_hits_as_int support is also",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "HTTP Error: Search service failed: json: cannot unmarshal object into Go struct field SearchHits.total of type int64"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "jaeger",
+      "graduated",
+      "observability",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "jaeger"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "advanced",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/jaegertracing/jaeger/issues/1474",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/jaegertracing/jaeger",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/jaegertracing/jaeger/pull/1690"
+    },
+    "reactions": 20,
+    "comments": 33,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with jaeger installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-11T02:49:46.873Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
